column1: # Net::SSLeay symbol inventory — the source of truth for the complete-
#   name   — Perl-visible symbol (sub name or constant)
#              DONE    = matches OpenSSL behaviour closely enough that CPAN
#                        modules depending on it should work
#              PARTIAL = calls into a real backend, but some corner cases /
#                        signatures / error codes are still off
#              STUB    = returns a hardcoded value with no side effect, or
#                        stores state no other code reads; lies about success
#              MISSING = not registered; callers croak with
#   notes  — one-liner; expand in the plan doc for anything nontrivial
# The classifier is an approximation — hand-tune rows as the work progresses.
